title: OXANILIC ACID THIOAMIDE AS AN ANALYTICAL REAGENT
author: ANIL KUMAR MAJUMDAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Oxanilic acid thioamide has been used as an analytical reagent for the estimation of copper cobalt and nickel.
steps_raw: Oxanilic acid thioamide has been used as an analytical reagent for the estimation of copper cobalt and nickel.
